\tzpentry{ID5810}{Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5810 introduces Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \frac{\partial g_{\mu\nu}}{\partial t} &= \frac{16\pi G}{c^4}\int_{-\infty}^t T_{\mu\nu}(\tau)e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau \\ \frac{D\boldsymbol{\mu}_{\text{eff}}}{Dt} &= \gamma(\boldsymbol{\mu}_{\text{eff}} \times \mathbf{B}) - \frac{(\boldsymbol{\mu}_{\text{eff}} \cdot \boldsymbol{\omega})\boldsymbol{\omega}}{\omega^2} \\ \frac{\partial\Omega_{\text{pattern}}}{\partial t} &= -\frac{\kappa^2}{2\pi}\langle R \cdot \Sigma \cdot \delta W/\delta\Omega\rangle_r \\ \frac{\partial\mathcal{H}}{\partial t} &= -2\oint_{\partial\mathcal{V}}(\mathbf{A} \times \mathbf{E}) \cdot \hat{\mathbf{n}} \, dS \end{align}
